summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DOMMMA Social Features (Iteration 9). All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified: Favorites functionality on Browse page (heart icon toggle), Favorites page at /favorites displaying saved listings with compare toggle, Property Comparison tool with side-by-side view, Roommate Finder at /roommates with profile creation/editing, Dashboard sidebar with 'Saved Properties' and 'Roommate Finder' links.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/favorites toggles favorite status (add/remove)
Backend: GET /api/favorites/{user_id}/ids returns list of favorited listing IDs
Backend: GET /api/favorites/{user_id} returns full listing data for favorites
Backend: POST /api/compare with 2 listings returns comparison data
Backend: POST /api/compare with 4 listings returns comparison data (max)
Backend: POST /api/compare with 1 listing returns 400 (validation)
Backend: POST /api/compare with 5 listings returns 400 (validation)
Backend: POST /api/roommates/profile creates/updates roommate profile
Backend: GET /api/roommates/profile/{user_id} returns profile data
Backend: GET /api/roommates/search returns matching profiles
Backend: GET /api/roommates/search with budget filters works
Backend: GET /api/roommates/connections/{user_id} returns connections list
Backend: Integration test - complete favorites flow (add → check → remove)
Backend: Dashboard API routes accessible
Backend: Auth login creates user if not exists
Frontend: Dashboard sidebar shows 'Saved Properties' link
Frontend: Dashboard sidebar shows 'Roommate Finder' link
Frontend: Browse page shows heart icon on listing cards
Frontend: Clicking heart icon toggles favorite (filled/unfilled)
Frontend: Favorites link (heart icon) visible in Browse header
Frontend: /favorites page loads with 'Saved Properties' header
Frontend: Favorites page shows saved listings with property details
Frontend: Favorites page has compare toggle buttons (scale icon)
Frontend: Favorites page has remove button (trash icon)
Frontend: Selecting 2+ properties shows compare bar at bottom
Frontend: Compare bar shows selected property thumbnails
Frontend: Compare bar shows 'Compare (n)' button
Frontend: /compare page loads with side-by-side comparison
Frontend: Compare page shows property images and titles
Frontend: Compare page highlights best values (price, bedrooms, sqft)
Frontend: Compare page shows all comparison metrics (price, type, listing, bedrooms, bathrooms, sqft, location, pet-friendly, parking, available date, amenities)
Frontend: /roommates page loads with 'Roommate Finder' header
Frontend: Roommate Finder shows Browse/Connections tabs
Frontend: Edit/Create Profile button opens modal
Frontend: Profile modal has all fields (name, age, gender, occupation, budget, move-in date, areas, lifestyle, pets, smoking, bio)
Frontend: Profile modal has Cancel and Save Profile buttons
Frontend: Profile save works correctly
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Test user auto-created on login. Roommate profile created during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Social Features (Iteration 9) fully tested and working: 1) Favorites: Browse page has heart icons on listings, clicking toggles favorite state, favorites link in header shows count badge, /favorites page displays saved listings with compare/remove buttons. 2) Compare: Select 2-4 properties from favorites page, compare bar appears at bottom, clicking Compare navigates to /compare with side-by-side comparison showing all property details with best values highlighted. 3) Roommate Finder: /roommates page has Browse/Connections tabs, Edit Profile button opens modal with comprehensive form (name, age, gender, occupation, budget range, move-in date, preferred areas as chips, lifestyle options as chips, pets/smoking checkboxes, bio textarea). 4) Dashboard sidebar: Renters see 'Saved Properties' and 'Roommate Finder' links. All previous V4 (Buy/Sell) and V3 (AI tools) features still working.

Favorites on Browse Page.details: Heart icon on each listing card. Clicking toggles favorite (filled=favorited). Redirects to login if not authenticated.

Favorites Link in Header.details: Heart icon in Browse header links to /favorites. Shows count badge when favorites > 0.

Favorites Page.details: /favorites shows 'Saved Properties' header with heart count. Displays saved listings in grid with property details, compare toggle (scale icon), and remove button (trash icon).

Property Comparison.details: Select 2-4 properties via compare toggle on favorites page. Compare bar appears at bottom showing thumbnails and 'Compare (n)' button. /compare shows side-by-side comparison with highlighted best values.

Roommate Finder.details: /roommates shows Browse/Connections tabs with counts. Edit/Create Profile opens modal with name, age, gender, occupation, budget range, move-in date, preferred areas (chip selection), lifestyle (chip selection), pets/smoking checkboxes, bio textarea.

Dashboard Sidebar Links.details: Renter dashboard sidebar includes 'Saved Properties' (/favorites) and 'Roommate Finder' (/roommates) links.

notes.Auth_Behavior: Clicking favorite heart on Browse while logged out redirects to /login. After login, user can use all social features.
notes.Compare_Limits: API enforces 2-4 property limit for comparison. Frontend shows 'select 2-4 to compare' guidance.
notes.Roommate_Search: Search excludes current user's profile. Currently shows 'No Roommates Found' as only test user profile exists.
notes.Previous_Features: All V4 (Buy/Sell with offers) and V3 (AI tools: Smart Issue Reporter, Document Analyzer, Commute Optimizer) features still working per previous testing.
